game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **君しかいない** "You Are The Only One" is a first-person atmospheric adventure game with horror elements, where players navigate a mysterious environment using a virtual joystick for movement and swiping the screen to control camera perspective. The core gameplay involves exploring interconnected areas, interacting with objects and environmental clues by tapping on them, and solving environmental puzzles to progress the narrative. Players must piece together fragmented information and make critical choices or perform specific actions that influence the unfolding story, leading to one of several distinct narrative endings. Progression is driven by uncovering new areas, deciphering the main secrets of the game world, and unlocking additional dialogue or lore entries, with the ultimate goal being to discover all available endings. The horror elements manifest through unsettling atmosphere, jump scares, and potential failure states where incorrect choices or encounters with threats can lead to an immediate game over, forcing a restart from the last checkpoint.
game_info.description: Navigate through a dark, mysterious facility as the sole survivor. Explore interconnected rooms, examine objects for clues, and solve environmental puzzles to uncover the truth. Find keycards to unlock new areas, read journal entries to piece together the story, and discover one of multiple endings. Beware: wrong choices or dangerous encounters can lead to immediate game over. Your goal is to escape by finding all necessary items and making the right decisions.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects (examine, pick up items, read notes)
Shift: Sprint (moves faster, limited stamina)
Z: Use equipped item (keycard at doors)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu
Enter: Start game from menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and navigation through the facility. Validates that the player can move in all directions, turn the camera, and navigate through accessible rooms without getting stuck.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through each room systematically, testing forward/backward movement and rotation. Verify collision detection works correctly and player doesn't clip through walls. Navigate to different areas to ensure pathfinding is possible.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves through multiple rooms, turns in all directions, and maintains proper collision with walls. Position updates correctly and player remains visible on screen throughout movement.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and navigation through the facility. Validates that the player can move in all directions, turn the camera, and navigate through accessible rooms without getting stuck.
TEST_1.strategy: Move through each room systematically, testing forward/backward movement and rotation. Verify collision detection works correctly and player doesn't clip through walls. Navigate to different areas to ensure pathfinding is possible.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves through multiple rooms, turns in all directions, and maintains proper collision with walls. Position updates correctly and player remains visible on screen throughout movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal path to win the game by collecting all necessary items and reaching the escape ending. Validates item pickup, keycard usage, and proper ending trigger.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the shortest path to collect the red keycard, then blue keycard, then green keycard. Use each keycard to unlock the corresponding doors in sequence. Navigate to the final escape door and activate it to trigger the win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player collects all three keycards, unlocks all locked doors, reaches the escape door, and triggers GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score increases with each item collected and ending achieved.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests interaction system by examining objects and reading journal entries. Validates that Space key properly triggers interactions and updates game state.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move to various interactive objects (desks, computers, notes) and press Space when near them. Verify that examination text appears and journal entries are properly collected and stored.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully interacts with objects, reads journal entries, and game state updates to reflect discovered lore. Interaction prompts appear when near objects.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests sprint mechanic and stamina system. Validates that Shift key enables faster movement and stamina depletes/regenerates properly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Hold Shift while moving to sprint. Monitor stamina depletion during sprint and regeneration when not sprinting. Test that movement speed increases during sprint and returns to normal when stamina is depleted.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Sprint successfully increases movement speed, stamina depletes during sprint, regenerates when not sprinting, and movement returns to normal speed when stamina is exhausted.
TEST_4.description: Tests sprint mechanic and stamina system. Validates that Shift key enables faster movement and stamina depletes/regenerates properly.

TEST_4.expected: Sprint successfully increases movement speed, stamina depletes during sprint, regenerates when not sprinting, and movement returns to normal speed when stamina is exhausted.
